MODEL ARCHITECTURE
MONTE CARLO
Poisson 5K. SP ERA/FIP + park + HFA. ESPN odds implied prob.
BAYESIAN
Beta-binomial prior. Posterior updates per result.
ELO + SP
K=20. Pitcher quality adjusts ±4%. Market calibration.
WEIGHTS
MONTE CARLO50%
BAYESIAN20%
ELO30%
SUM: 100%
SYSTEM CONFIG
// MODEL PARAMETERS
HFA BOOST %4%
ELO K-FACTOR20
MIN EV %2%

NHL MODEL ARCHITECTURE
MONTE CARLO
Poisson 5K sims. xGF/60 + GSAx + PP/PK. Home ice advantage baked in.
BAYESIAN
Beta-binomial posterior. Series history + GSAx prior. Updates each game.
ELO + MOV
K=20. Margin-of-victory multiplier. HockeyViz xGF calibration.
MONEYPUCK
HDCF%, xGF%, GSAx, PP xG vs PK xGA. Series-adjusted.
MARKOV
Win streak momentum. Hot/cold detection via HMM smoothing.
RF ENSEMBLE
Random Forest feature blend. Goalie performance × matchup × fatigue.
WEIGHTS
MONTE CARLO50%
BAYESIAN20%
ELO30%
MODEL FACTORS
CORSI FOR %
Shot attempt % at even strength. Weight: HIGH
xG DIFFERENTIAL
Expected goals for minus against. Weight: HIGH
GSAx
Goals saved above expected. Weight: HIGH
PDO
SV% + SH% regression indicator. Weight: MED
PP EFFICIENCY
Power play % vs PK%. Weight: MED
H/A SPLITS
Home ice advantage adjustment. Weight: LOW

ACTIVE NBA BETS
NBA MODEL ARCHITECTURE
MONTE CARLO
5K sims. Net Rating + Pace + eFG% + HFA. ESPN odds calibration.
BAYESIAN
Beta-binomial posterior. Series + rest day adjustments.
ELO + MOV
K=20. Margin-of-victory multiplier. BBRef advanced stats.
MODEL FACTORS
NET RATING
Points per 100 possessions differential. Weight: HIGH
PACE-ADJ eFG%
Effective FG% adjusted for pace. Weight: HIGH
DEFENSIVE RTG
Points allowed per 100 possessions. Weight: HIGH
TO%
Turnover rate — efficiency indicator. Weight: MED
FT RATE
Free throw attempt rate. Weight: MED
REST ADVANTAGE
Days rest differential between teams. Weight: LOW

BAYESIAN20%

WNBA MODEL ARCHITECTURE
MONTE CARLO
5K sims. Net Rating + Pace + eFG% + HFA. ESPN odds calibration.
BAYESIAN
Beta-binomial posterior. Home court + rest day adjustments.
ELO + MOV
K=20. Margin-of-victory multiplier. BBRef advanced stats.
MODEL FACTORS
NET RATING
Points per 100 possessions differential. Weight: HIGH
PACE-ADJ eFG%
Effective FG% adjusted for pace. Weight: HIGH
DEFENSIVE RTG
Points allowed per 100 possessions. Weight: HIGH
ESPN ODDS
Market implied probability blend 30%. Weight: MED
HFA
Home court advantage factor. Weight: MED
REST ADVANTAGE
Days rest differential between teams. Weight: LOW

HEAD-TO-HEAD ANALYSIS
FORMAT GUIDE  ·  BO3 (Best of 3) — most used on tour: ATP 250/500, WTA all events, Davis Cup group stage. First to win 2 sets takes the match. Shorter total duration (~90 min avg). Serve dominance matters less — breaks are more decisive. Model weight: recent form + surface ELO.  ·  BO5 (Best of 5) — used only at Grand Slams (men's draw) and Davis Cup finals. First to win 3 sets takes the match (~3–4 hr avg). Physical conditioning, mental resilience, and big-server advantage are amplified. Comebacks from 2-sets-down happen more (~18% rate). Model weight: surface ELO + historical deep-run data.
// SELECT PLAYERS TO ANALYZE
